title: Availability, Disaster Recovery, and Validation · Operations Brief: Net Mttr Mtbf
summary: Define recovery objectives and prove branch, service, configuration, and site recovery under realistic failures. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net mttr mtbf increment in a tested network continuity plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use MTTR and MTBF as population and process indicators without treating averages as individual guarantees.
Define RPO and RTO from business impact and map them to backup, replication, restoration, and test requirements.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
